ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm being evaluated */,
  "x_axis" INTEGER /* The x-axis value representing a condition or scenario */,
  "ur_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric for the unregularized algorithm */,
  "ur_fairness" REAL /* Fairness metric for the unregularized algorithm */,
  "rs_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric for the regularized algorithm */,
  "rs_fairness" REAL /* Fairness metric for the regularized algorithm */,
  "nonal_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric for the non-algorithmic approach */,
  "nonal_fairness" REAL /* Fairness metric for the non-algorithmic approach */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* The date when the performance test was conducted */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* The environment where the test was conducted */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the test */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_iterations" INTEGER /* The number of iterations the test was run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_x_axis FOREIGN KEY ("x_axis") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the algorithm was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* The date when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the algorithm */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the condition was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* The date when the condition was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "request_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the request in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES algorithm_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* The date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
